title: Bhander Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bhander, with a Z-Score of +7.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, posing significant threats.
body:
The current heat wave in Bhander is characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 23.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 15%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature, making it feel even hotter. 
 The wind speed of 16.7 km/h may provide slight relief, but it is not enough to mitigate the overall impact of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the population and infrastructure.
